tool_args.label: Dedicated Bus Lanes on Nostrand Avenue
tool_args.raw_text: Dedicated Bus Lane & Right Turn Lane: Offset bus lane allows buses to move quickly and preserves parking. Parking in midday, nights, and weekends; Travel Lane in AM and PM peak periods.

payload.description: Dedicated Bus Lane & Right Turn Lane: Offset bus lane allows buses to move quickly and preserves parking. Parking in midday, nights, and weekends; Travel Lane in AM and PM peak periods.
payload.location_text: Design from Flushing Ave to Eastern Pkwy, and Empire Blvd to Farragut Rd. Bus Lane at right curb on Nostrand & Rogers between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd, and on Bedford Ave between DeKalb & Flushing Aves

normalized_location.raw_text: Design from Flushing Ave to Eastern Pkwy, and Empire Blvd to Farragut Rd. Bus Lane at right curb on Nostrand & Rogers between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd, and on Bedford Ave between DeKalb & Flushing Aves

tool_args.label: Bus Bulbs at SBS Stations
tool_args.raw_text: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane. Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic. Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

payload.description: Sidewalks at SBS stations extend out to the bus lane; buses do not need to pull in and out of traffic; higher curbs allow easier boarding
